channel.title: fish-shellfish-plates Posts - RSS Feed
channel.description: Fresh fish-shellfish-plates posts and cooking inspiration

item.title: Quick Grilled Salmon with Fresh Spring Herb Sauce for Light Dinners
item.description: This grilled salmon is super quick and loaded with fresh spring herbs that make it pop with flavor. The bright herb sauce really lifts the dish. Perfect for a light dinner or weekend cookout!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 10 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 oz each
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil, divided
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • 1/4 cup fresh parsley, chopped
  • 2 tablespoons fresh dill, chopped
  • 2 tablespoons fresh chives, chopped
  • 1 garlic clove, minced
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230072178 #Easypost #quickpost #30minutemeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #olive #tablespoon

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Quick Grilled Salmon with Fresh Spring Herb Sauce for Light Dinners
media:content.media:description: This grilled salmon is super quick and loaded with fresh spring herbs that make it pop with flavor. The bright herb sauce really lifts the dish. Perfect for a light dinner or weekend cookout!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230072178, Easypost, quickpost, 30minutemeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, salmon, olive, tablespoon

item.title: Light and Fresh Baked Salmon with Lemon Dill and Spring Veggies
item.description: This baked salmon is super fresh and light, perfect for a quick and healthy dinner. The zing of lemon and dill lifts the fish, while tender asparagus and sweet peas make it feel like spring on a plate. Great for busy nights when you want something wholesome but simple.
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 oz each
  • 1 lemon, thinly sliced plus 2 tablespoons juice
  • 2 tablespoons fresh dill, chopped
  • 1 bunch asparagus, trimmed
  • 1 cup fresh or frozen peas
  • 2 tablespoons olive oil
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 garlic clove, minced

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230072178 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #lemon #fresh

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Light and Fresh Baked Salmon with Lemon Dill and Spring Veggies
media:content.media:description: This baked salmon is super fresh and light, perfect for a quick and healthy dinner. The zing of lemon and dill lifts the fish, while tender asparagus and sweet peas make it feel like spring on a plate. Great for busy nights when you want something wholesome but simple.

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230072178, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, salmon, lemon, fresh

item.title: Creamy Garlic Butter Salmon with Tender Asparagus in 30 Minutes
item.description: This salmon recipe is a quick, creamy delight that pairs tender fish with garlicky butter sauce and crisp asparagus. The splash of cream makes the sauce irresistibly smooth. Perfect for a fancy weeknight dinner!
item.dc:creator: author_001
item.content:encoded:
⏱️ Prep Time: 15 minutes

🍳 Cook Time: 30 minutes

⏰ Total Time: N/A minutes

🍽️ Servings: 4

📊 Difficulty: Easy

🥘 Ingredients

  • 4 salmon fillets, skin on, about 6 oz each
  • 1 bunch asparagus, trimmed and washed
  • 3 tablespoons unsalted butter, divided
  • 4 cloves garlic, minced
  • 1/4 cup heavy cream
  • 1 tablespoon fresh lemon juice
  • Salt and freshly ground black pepper, to taste
  • 1 tablespoon olive oil

👩‍🍳 Instructions

📌 Pinterest Tags: #cat1761230072178 #Easypost #1hourmeals #post #cooking #foodie #homemade #delicious #salmon #bunch #unsalted

📌 Save this post to Pinterest!

Perfect for meal planning and sharing with friends

media:content.media:title: Creamy Garlic Butter Salmon with Tender Asparagus in 30 Minutes
media:content.media:description: This salmon recipe is a quick, creamy delight that pairs tender fish with garlicky butter sauce and crisp asparagus. The splash of cream makes the sauce irresistibly smooth. Perfect for a fancy weeknight dinner!

media:group.media:keywords: cat1761230072178, Easypost, 1hourmeals, post, cooking, foodie, homemade, delicious, salmon, bunch, unsalted
